name: construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month, compliance documentation delays cause potential fines and project delays. We automate OSHA documentation preparation instead of manual documentation processes using spreadsheets and templates.
problem_solved: Difficulty in preparing OSHA compliance documentation accurately and on time.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in preparing OSHA compliance documentation accurately and on time.
